{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041633AE43E633F19478D05664"}"},"total":262},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7549569272915100441","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材很新颖，让人感觉眼前一亮"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757772367,"group_id":"7515277753881463832","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8V9QNTXC9RKtzn7CHi+rFQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"681303522674732","user_name":"殷某豪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"681303522674732","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1726532384,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7515277753881463832","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒+巫族崛起+虐鸿钧+虐天道+盘古未陨落+逻辑在线】
穿越洪荒，成为天地间第一巫：帝尊。自带未来记忆，深知巫族悲惨结局。
提前出世，能获得大道赐福？还能获得吞噬之体……
崛起？吾有盘古父神留下的后手。轻松将鸿钧和天道虐成狗。
于是，洪荒画风突变。
道魔之争刚结束。帝尊突然宣布，吾已证道混元大罗！
一步先，步步先。
抢先一步，传道天下，让鸿钧无道可讲！
抢先一步，开辟三十三天，让鸿钧无天可开！
抢先一步，开辟幽冥界，让完整的地道出世！
又抢先一步……
天道和鸿钧，愁得掉头发。
天道：鸿钧，你个废物，再不成圣，就打断你条腿。
鸿钧：业力缠身，如何成圣？先借属下些功德……
天道：废物，再不讲道，仔细你的皮……
鸿钧：帝尊讲道，说的都是我的词啊！
帝尊：本尊创立仙道，建立玄门，以斩三尸之法……造福洪荒……
鸿钧：主上……要不……强行推动量劫吧……
帝尊从一旁冲了过来，将天道和鸿钧打得鼻青脸肿。
天道和鸿钧开始摆烂……
“快些毁灭吧，赶紧的，累了！”
……
“给自己一个机会，带你领略，完全不同的洪荒~！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bd1bb98aaffe30a8e70178828d39ece2","author":"爱上天涯","author_id":"","book_id":"7515277753881463832","book_name":"洪荒：盘古未陨落，天道傻眼了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7515278060560597528","read_count":"35931","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"961711"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"418","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b017d6434fd950bfed364a4a1dc301b5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308193&x-signature=Q7NX%2Fhx2Ca3QLNfcpkQR3ER2qPc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2850347544744509","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"188"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041633AE43E633F19478D05664"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"l
